testsuite.name: Purchase product

testcase.name: Validate products are shown in checkout summary
Complete payment form with card data
Sign in with email and OTP validation

testsuite.system-err: may 30, 2026 11:33:53 A. M. org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTENCIA: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 148, returning the closest version; found: 145; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 148
